item.text: According to the TV adverts of the '80s and '90s, what did the man from Del Monte say to the delight of fruit growers when accepting their produce?

After the tragic Ethiopian aircrash in March 2019, various countries' aviation authorities, including the UK, Germany, Australia and Singapore, banned the use of which model of Boeing passenger aircraft?
What is the lowest rank in the British peerage?
What musical instrument is pictured on the back of an Irish one Euro coin?
In Scottish football, who are Hibernian FC's biggest rivals?
Bowser, the King of the Koopas, is the nemesis of what Nintendo character?
What was unusual about the 1960 Olympic marathon win by Abebe Bikila?

options.opt: He stopped during the race to talk to a spectator
He was 5th past the post and the first 4 were disqualified

item.text: In what year did pro-democracy demonstrators clash with the Chinese government in Tiananmen Square; the USSR pulled out of Afghanistan; and serial killer Ted Bundy was executed?
In the TV show, "Friends," according to Chandler, as well as being tidy, Monica is freakishly what?
In physics, what word can be defined as 'the rate of work done'?
What is the name of the English engineer credited with inventing the World Wide Web?
"I wanna be the very best, like no one ever was, to catch them is my real test, to train them is my cause" are lines from which TV show's theme song?
First used in 1821, what Old West trail connected Missouri with New Mexico?
Which former England manager released the autobiography 'Spurred to Success' in 1987, and recently released another one entitled 'Playmaker: My Life and the Love of Football'?
Which Marvel anti-hero has the real name 'Johnny Blaze'?
What does a baroscope measure?
In which modern-day country was Nelson Mandela born?
Put these sports in order of how many players are in a team, from fewest to most.
item.answer_text: Basketball 5, Netball 7, Cricket 11, Rugby League 13, Rugby Union 15, Aussie Rules 18
item.long_answer: Basketball 5, Netball 7, Cricket 11, Rugby League 13, Rugby Union 15, Aussie Rules 18

item.text: In which 1988 film is the part of "Josh Baskin"played by both David Moscow and Tom Hanks?
According to the saying, 'A nod's as good as a wink to a....' what?
